creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
FreeBSD 2.0.5R misses all Makefiles under /usr/share/examples, even
though they are available in CVS.  This is regardless whether the
installation has been performed from the distributions, or you're
looking at the live filesystem on the second release CD.

Fix: 

No idea why this happened at all.  This is just a reminder _that_ it
happened, and the PR should be closed as soon as the reason is clear
and it's ensured that it wouldn't happen again in subsequent releases.
How-To-Repeat: 
Take out the second release CD, or install the distribution.
